overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage of a grand gothic great hall illuminated by hundreds of floating candles. The scene features long dining tables with seated figures, towering stained glass windows, and a translucent ghostly figure in the foreground, evoking a magical medieval atmosphere reminiscent of Hogwarts.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand gothic dining hall with floating candle chandeliers

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady view of a magnificent gothic great hall bathed in the warm golden glow of floating candle chandeliers. Long dining tables line both sides of a central marble aisle, filled with seated figures dining, while a translucent blue ghost hovers in the right foreground. The far end features a towering stained glass window set within ornate stone arches, completing the magical medieval atmosphere of this game engine scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, immersive gaze across a magnificent gothic great hall bathed in a warm, magical glow. It begins by capturing the vast scale of the room, where hundreds of floating candle chandeliers cast golden light over long dining tables filled with seated figures. As the eye travels along the central marble aisle, a translucent blue ghost hovers in the right foreground, adding a spectral layer to the medieval atmosphere. The perspective finally settles on the far end of the hall, where a towering stained glass window is framed by ornate stone arches.
